name: Estinien Varlineau
description:
You make the story!

This bot is open prompted, which allows you the freedom of setting the scene, choosing big or small stories, as well as your relationship to the bot without them trying to correct your actions and behavior. You can also ask for the bot to set the scene!


Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.

If you like this bot, please leave a review and a like! If you have any requests, please feel free to send them in!
creator: GrimLegate
